scripts.verify: npm run check:npm-registry && npm run lint
scripts.prebuild: npm run cleanup:obsolete && npm run verify && node scripts/check-no-old-preview-url.mjs && node scripts/copy-pdf-worker.mjs
scripts.prebuild:frontend: npm run cleanup:obsolete && npm run verify && node scripts/check-no-old-preview-url.mjs && node scripts/copy-pdf-worker.mjs
scripts.prebuild:vercel: npm run cleanup:obsolete && npm run validate:vercel-env && npm run verify && node scripts/check-no-old-preview-url.mjs && node scripts/copy-pdf-worker.mjs
scripts.build: npm run verify && vite build && esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --sourcemap --outfile=dist/server.cjs
scripts.build:backend: npm run verify && vite build && esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --sourcemap --outfile=dist/server.cjs
scripts.bundle:vercel: node scripts/build-vercel-runtime.mjs && node scripts/verify-vercel-runtime.mjs && node scripts/smoke-vercel-runtime.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:sources && npm run test:knowledge && npm run test:security && npm run test:video && npm run test:ai-evals
